mapper.select: SELECT d.data_id AS dataId, d.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, d.channel_id AS channelId, c.channel_name AS channelName, d.view_num AS viewNum, d.exposure_num AS exposureNum, d.stat_time AS statTime FROM spread_data d INNER JOIN heritage_project p ON d.project_id = p.project_id INNER JOIN spread_channel c ON d.channel_id = c.channel_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY d.stat_time DESC, d.data_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spread_data d INNER JOIN heritage_project p ON d.project_id = p.project_id INNER JOIN spread_channel c ON d.channel_id = c.channel_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND c.status = 1

SELECT DATE(d.stat_time) AS date, SUM(d.view_num) AS viewNum, SUM(d.exposure_num) AS exposureNum FROM spread_data d INNER JOIN heritage_project p ON d.project_id = p.project_id INNER JOIN spread_channel c ON d.channel_id = c.channel_id WHERE d.project_id = #{projectId} AND p.status = 1 AND c.status = 1 GROUP BY DATE(d.stat_time) ORDER BY DATE(d.stat_time) ASC
